final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3:4 vertical 9-grid poster for Xiaohongshu lifestyle content, designed for direct slicing into 9 standalone posts, with clean premium unified aesthetics for female wellness audience.

Style/medium: editorial wellness poster with the soft material honesty of ins-style lifestyle design, gentle clay-like illustrations, magazine-grade typography
Composition: standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows) with clear borders between cells, each cell centered and self-contained, generous breathing room around all edges, grid lines positioned to avoid cutting through text
Subject: 
  Cell 1 (cover): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" (main title) + "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" (subtitle) + soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask elements
  Cell 2: "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" + "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" + phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Cell 3: "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" + "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" + bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Cell 4: "3. 房间温度别太高" + "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" + air conditioner, thermometer, blanket
  Cell 5: "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" + "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" + coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Cell 6: "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" + "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" + bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Cell 7: "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" + "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" + notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Cell 8: "7. 固定上床时间" + "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" + clock, moon, bed
  Cell 9: "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" + "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" + "收藏这组，今晚试试看" (footer) + breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: cream white base with subtle oat texture, each cell framed as an independent Xiaohongshu card
Lighting/mood: the soft warmth of a Sunday evening wind-down, gentle and restorative
Color palette: cream white, light beige, pale oat, soft caramel as dominant tones, deep brown for text, the quiet comfort of a well-curated bedroom
Materials/textures: matte paper surface with subtle clay-like illustration textures, soft shadows under elements
Text (verbatim): 让你倒头就睡的8个 tips, 失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏, 1. 睡前1小时别玩手机, 蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。, 2. 睡前把灯光调暗, 暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。, 3. 房间温度别太高, 稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。, 4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡, 咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。, 5. 睡前洗个热水澡, 能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。, 6. 脑子停不下来就写下来, 把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。, 7. 固定上床时间, 每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。, 8. 试试深呼吸放松法, 吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。, 收藏这组，今晚试试看
Constraints: all text in Chinese, large readable fonts, no text near grid dividers, each cell must work as standalone image, magazine-quality layout, suitable for direct slicing
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, over-decoration, text too close to grid lines, garish colors, cluttered composition
